overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit city. The player navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and explores the atmospheric urban environment with towering holographic advertisements and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with hanging red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure, passing neon billboards

entered.detail: large vertical screen displaying a face with 'CALL NOW' text in red neon
string of glowing red spherical lanterns hanging overhead along the walkway
massive concrete overpass with support columns spanning across the street
tall cylindrical building with illuminated 'EL GUAPO' signage near the top
black metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, illuminated by red paper lanterns and neon billboards. The player walks forward along the barrier-lined path toward a distant intersection, with the El Guapo tower visible ahead through the hazy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with yellow zebra crossing stripes

events.description: stepping onto the yellow-striped crosswalk and beginning to cross the multi-lane intersection
completing the street crossing and turning right onto the adjacent sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection on the yellow crosswalk among other pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing red umbrella walking in the opposite direction across the crosswalk
white delivery van driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
illuminated traffic signal showing red for vehicles

segments.scene_description: The player steps onto the yellow crosswalk and crosses the intersection, sharing the space with pedestrians carrying umbrellas. After crossing, the camera turns right onto a new sidewalk, bringing the El Guapo tower closer into view while the initial neon billboards recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner with restaurants and hotels

events.description: passing the Wok Shack corner and continuing along the curved neon-lit street

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial storefronts including the Wok Shack restaurant and hotel entrances, navigating around planters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright green pants standing near the corner looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign reading 'WOK SHACK' on the corner building facade
blue illuminated sign with 'HOTEL' text and Japanese characters
large concrete planter with palm trees dividing the walkway
massive building-mounted digital billboard displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along the curved commercial street, the player passes the glowing pink Wok Shack sign and hotel entrances. Palm tree planters line the path while massive digital billboards illuminate the wet pavement, and the El Guapo tower gradually recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with intense red neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered underpass area where red neon lights dominate the ambient illumination
futuristic hover taxi passes by on the street to the right, hovering above the ground

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered underpass with red ambient lighting, approaching a parked futuristic vehicle

notable_agents.action: futuristic yellow-green hover taxi parked on the street ahead with glowing undercarriage

entered.detail: intense linear red neon tubes mounted overhead along the underpass ceiling
concrete overhead structure creating a tunnel-like covered walkway
yellow and green hovering vehicle with futuristic design and illuminated accents
floating three-dimensional holographic screen displaying product advertisements
illuminated sign for a pawn shop with blue and white lighting

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered underpass bathed in intense red neon light, leaving the open street behind. A futuristic yellow hover taxi is parked ahead while holographic advertisements float in the air, and the environment becomes more enclosed and atmospheric with the red glow reflecting off the wet concrete surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked urban district that shifts from an open neon-lit intersection into a claustrophobic, red-hued underpass. It begins on a slick sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, moving past red paper lanterns and billboards toward the distant El Guapo tower. As the camera steps onto a yellow crosswalk among pedestrians with umbrellas, it turns right, bringing the tower into closer view before the perspective shifts along a curved commercial street lined with palm tree planters and the glowing pink sign of a Wok Shack. The scene then transitions away from the open street and the receding tower as the camera enters a covered underpass. Finally, the environment becomes enclosed and atmospheric, bathed in intense red neon light that reflects off wet concrete and illuminates a parked yellow hover taxi and floating holographic advertisements.
